scenario.title: Data migration scenario
scenario.subtitle: Analyze production against development, then migrate real data into a staging database with AI-guided fixes.
scenario.step1Hint: Choose the production source, the development schema, and the staging target.
scenario.needProfiles: Add production, development and staging connection profiles first:
scenario.step3Hint: Runs in one transaction. On any failure the target is rolled back.
scenario.confirmWrite: Write migrated data into the staging database "{db}".

dashboard.title: Schema drift control
dashboard.subtitle: PostgreSQL production data checked against the newer development schema.

connections.title: Connections
connections.credentialNotice: Passwords are stored unencrypted at rest for this hackathon MVP and are never returned by the API.
connections.passwordApiNotice: Passwords are never returned by the API.
connections.externalHosts: External hosts are {state}. All connection tests and analyses use read-only transactions.
connections.keepPassword: Leave password blank to keep the current value.
connections.credentialsBackend: Connection credentials stay in the backend.
connections.name: Name

analysis.title: New analysis
analysis.subtitle: Compare selected PostgreSQL schemas using read-only sessions.
analysis.liveSafety: Analysis and reporting only. No SQL is executed against selected databases.
analysis.selectTestedProfiles: Select tested profiles with saved schemas.
analysis.preflightHint: Bounded read-only counts and up to five sampled invalid values.
analysis.demoHint: The one-click demo uses the seeded StageBridge databases and keeps the isolated dry run.
analysis.demoSafety: Seeded databases with an isolated writable dry-run target.
analysis.liveDetailSafety: Read-only inspection and reporting. SQL previews are never executed against live databases.

conflicts.title: Conflicts
conflicts.structuralDifference: This is a structural schema difference that needs review.
conflicts.reviewOnlySql: -- Review-only structural change; no executable SQL is provided.

categories.new_foreign_key_orphans: New foreign key with orphan rows

explanations.nullable_to_not_null: Production NULL values cannot satisfy the development NOT NULL constraint.
explanations.incompatible_type_change: Some production values cannot be converted safely to the development data type.
explanations.text_to_integer: Non-numeric production text cannot be converted to an integer.
explanations.enum_value_mismatch: Production uses enum values that are absent from the development enum.
explanations.new_foreign_key_orphans: Orphan production rows do not reference an existing parent key.
explanations.new_unique_constraint_duplicates: Duplicate production values cannot satisfy the new unique constraint.
explanations.probable_column_rename: Source values need an explicit mapping to the probable renamed column.
explanations.varchar_length_reduction: Production values longer than the development limit will not fit.

genericStrategies: Validate the result in an isolated environment

rationales.reject_refresh: This breaking structural change has no automatic remediation and requires review.
rationales.backfill_null_with_default: Production NULL values must be handled before the NOT NULL constraint can be satisfied.
rationales.normalize_numeric_values: Only values proven compatible by a bounded preflight should be converted.
rationales.map_enum_values: Removed production enum values require an explicit reviewed mapping.
rationales.remove_or_remap_orphans: Orphan source rows cannot satisfy the development foreign key.
rationales.deduplicate_values: Duplicate production values cannot satisfy the development unique constraint.
rationales.map_renamed_column: The probable rename needs an explicit reviewed source-to-target mapping.
rationales.postpone_constraint: The constraint can be postponed only through an explicit reviewed decision.
rationales.validate_constraint: Run post-load validation checks before marking the dry run passed.

previews.reject_refresh: -- No SQL is executed; the refresh is rejected.
previews.normalize_numeric_values: -- Stage and validate conversions; reject incompatible rows.
previews.map_enum_values: -- Apply only an explicitly approved enum mapping.
previews.remove_or_remap_orphans: -- Reject or explicitly remap orphaned keys.
previews.deduplicate_values: -- Load one row per approved unique key and retain rejected duplicates.
previews.map_renamed_column: -- Map the approved source column to the target column.
previews.postpone_constraint: -- Record the reviewed decision without changing the target constraint.
previews.validate_constraint: -- Run controlled validation queries; no live DDL is executed.

messages.safety_gate: Live analyses cannot enter the demo dry-run executor.
messages.approval_gate: Required controlled actions are not approved.
messages.reset_dryrun_database: The isolated stagebridge_dryrun schema was reset.
messages.apply_development_schema: The development schema and raw loading tables were applied.
messages.copy_source_data: Loaded {count} production rows into isolated raw tables.
messages.load_users: Loaded users with phone backfill and email deduplication.
messages.load_orders: Loaded valid orders and retained rejected rows for audit.
messages.dry_run_error: The isolated dry run failed safely.

reports.demoLimitation: The dry run is scoped to the seeded demo schemas and controlled action templates.
reports.liveLimitation: Live database analysis is read-only. SQL previews are advisory and are never executed.

validation.timeoutRange: Statement timeout must be between 100 and 120000 milliseconds.

errors.clipboardFailed: Could not copy the SQL plan.

ai.mockExplanation: The remediation plan is advisory. Live database SQL is never executed; use the findings and previews for a reviewed migration.
ai.regenerateForLocale: This OpenAI plan was generated in another language. Generate the AI plan again to receive its explanations in the selected language.
validationChecks: Re-run all supported preflight checks after remediation.
Review findings without automated preflight manually.
Apply changes through the normal reviewed migration process.
ai.empty: Generate an AI plan to review controlled remediation actions.
